pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which copies the sample data to this location, and verifier.py which checks this exact file path.
Verified by parsing the SampleDivesV2.ssrf XML file. A dive with the 'number' attribute set to 2 is found and its date (2010-12-04) and location (Sund Rock) match the task description.
Verified by reading the task instruction requiring an 'Integrated' weight system and verifier.py which asserts the description attribute of the weightsystem element contains 'integrated'.
Verified by reading the task instructions and verifier.py which parses the weight string and expects a value of 4.5.
Verified by reading verifier.py which checks if the parsed weight is between 4.4 and 4.6 (4.5 ± 0.1).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real dive data from Subsurface's SampleDivesV2.ssrf. The expected file is confirmed to be copied to /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf. Analyzing the XML dataset confirms that Dive #2 occurred on 2010-12-04 at Sund Rock and currently has no weight system data attached. The target values (Integrated, 4.5 kg, and 0.1 kg tolerance) are directly enforced by the verification logic in verifier.py.
